rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §257.004 governs campaign contribution restrictions beforegeneral elections. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 257.004. RESTRICTIONS ON CONTRIBUTIONS BEFORE GENERAL ELECTION.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to election finance, not property tax exemptions.
